bindingScopes.CONDITIONAL_ENVIRONMENT: source claim discharged only under assumptions explicit in the Lean type
bindingScopes.SOURCE_SUBCLAIM: checked atom retained alongside its now-bound parent
bindingScopes.DEFINITION_BINDING: source definition represented by an explicit Lean type

policy.completionRule: No DEFINITION, MATHEMATICAL, or CONDITIONAL node may remain PENDING. Empirical, interpretive, background, and normative content is never promoted to a mathematical theorem.

nodes.statement: The formalization is anchored to the immutable TeX source bytes.

The relative class and its relative complement form a complete disjoint partition.
For the quadratic complex iteration, modulus greater than two is an escape certificate.
The escape-radius criterion characterizes the exterior by a finite escape witness.
The union of all finite escape stages reconstructs the complement.
A correspondence map pulls the complement partition back to its domain.
Bounded subsets of Euclidean space are finitely epsilon-quantizable.
Bounded subsets of finite-dimensional normed spaces are finitely epsilon-quantizable.
Finite epsilon-quantizability does not imply ontic discreteness.
Finite exact prefix codes do not injectively determine an underlying infinite bit stream.
The complement partition is independent of ambient dimension.
Image-complement inclusion always holds; equality is equivalent to disjoint image classes, follows from injectivity, and becomes the full codomain complement under bijectivity.
The exact boundedness classifier is invariant under the trajectory shift.
Finite PASS/BLOCK gates are sound and refine monotonically under their certificate assumptions.
The finite gate is complete for exterior states under exterior completeness.
The finite gate is totally complete under exhaustive interior certificates.
Boundary points are instability points of the exact status classifier.
Later evidence can reclassify an earlier record without overwriting an autonomous earlier state.
Gate preservation factors through a process map exactly when status is constant on fibers.
Every additive physical equation must be dimensionally homogeneous.
Dimension-indexed and dynamically checked addition accepts equal dimensions and preserves their shared dimension.
The Lorentz interval is not a positive distance function on events.
Integer-coordinate Minkowski witnesses violate nonnegativity and point separation for the (-+++) quadratic form.
